indicators.name: large flat surface
indicators.rationale: A large flat surface is suitable for placing a laptop or monitor.

indicators.name: ergonomic chair
indicators.rationale: An ergonomic chair with lumbar support is suitable for long periods of sitting.

indicators.name: task lighting
indicators.rationale: Task lighting can reduce eye strain and improve visibility.

indicators.name: closed door
indicators.rationale: A closed door can provide privacy and reduce distractions.

indicators.name: dedicated workspace layout
indicators.rationale: The layout is focused on work, with minimal distractions.

reasoning_summary: The scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). While it has a large flat surface and ergonomic chair, the lack of task lighting and privacy may limit its suitability for extended work sessions.
